response.original_title: UFC Fight Night 280: Fiziev vs. Torres
response.overview: UFC Fight Night: Fiziev vs. Torres (also known as UFC Fight Night 280) was a mixed martial arts event produced by the Ultimate Fighting Championship that took place on June 27, 2026, at the National Gymnastics Arena in Baku, Azerbaijan.
response.title: UFC Fight Night 280: Fiziev vs. Torres
